Here is a paragraph about Epimedium sagittatum:

Epimedium sagittatum is a flowering plant species in the family Berberidaceae, commonly known as Epimedium or horny goat weed. The health benefits of Epimedium sagittatum include its potential to improve sexual function, boost libido, and support bone health due to its high content of icariin, a flavonoid glycoside. The bioactive constituents of Epimedium sagittatum include icariin, epimedin A, B, and C, as well as other flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids. The most common herbal preparations made with Epimedium sagittatum include capsules, tablets, and teas, often used to enhance male fertility, improve erectile function, and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
